identity.name: Shieka
identity.otherProficiencies: light + medium armor, shields, simple + martial weapons (Hexblade), pact weapon (any)

attacks.name: Pact Weapon
attacks.extra: summon as action, magic for resistance, +prof dmg vs cursed target via Hexblade's Curse

attacks.name: Eldritch Blast
attacks.notes: 1d10 force per beam, 2 beams at lvl 5, 120 ft
attacks.extra: Agonizing Blast adds CHA mod to dmg per beam (CHA -1 here, no help until you bump CHA)

attacks.name: Magic Wand
attacks.notes: +5 damage on hit, -3 to atk rolls (homebrew)

reaction.title: Hellish Rebuke
reaction.desc: 1d10 fire when a creature damages you (2d10 if upcast 2nd, 4d10 at 3rd). Burns a slot.

spells.name: Eldritch Blast
spells.desc: ranged spell atk, 1d10 force, 120 ft. +1 beam at 5/11/17

spells.name: Mage Hand
spells.desc: spectral hand, 30 ft, 10 lb manipulate. RAW guess, replace if needed

spells.name: Prestidigitation
spells.desc: minor magical effects. RAW guess, replace if needed

spells.name: Mage Armor
spells.desc: AC 13 + DEX (free at-will via Armor of Shadows, no slot)

spells.name: Hex
spells.desc: +1d6 necrotic on each hit, dis on chosen ability check. 1 hr conc

spells.name: Hellish Rebuke
spells.desc: reaction, 2d10 fire when damaged, save half. +1d10/slot

spells.name: Fly
spells.desc: 60 ft flying speed, 10 min conc, 1 target

spells.name: Exploding Skulls
spells.desc: 8d6 fire 20 ft sphere, DEX save DC 10 for half. Slow flight gives targets advantage on save (DM ruling)

features.name: Hexblade's Curse
features.desc: Curse a creature within 30 ft for 1 min: +prof bonus dmg vs them, crit on 19-20, regain HP equal to lvl + CHA mod when they die.

features.name: Hex Warrior
features.desc: Use CHA instead of STR/DEX for atk + dmg with one weapon you touch (or your pact weapon). With CHA 9 vs STR 15 here, STR wins anyway.

features.name: Pact Magic
features.desc: Slots restore on short rest. All slots cast at the highest level you've unlocked (3rd at lvl 5).

features.name: Pact of the Blade
features.desc: Summon a magical weapon as an action; counts as magic; can change form when summoned.

features.name: Agonizing Blast
features.desc: Add CHA mod to damage of each Eldritch Blast beam. Currently -1. Useful when CHA improves.

features.name: Armor of Shadows
features.desc: Cast Mage Armor on yourself at will, no slot, no components.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum
features.desc: Pick a 6th-lvl spell, cast 1/long rest without a slot. Adds 7th/8th/9th at lvls 13/15/17.

homebrew:
DERIVED FROM RAW (correct as needed):
* HP: 43 = 8 (lvl 1 max d8) + 4x5 (avg per d8 lvls 2-5) + 5x3 (CON 17 mod). Original sheet said 35.
* AC: 16 = chain shirt 13 + DEX 1 + shield 2. Justified by Hexblade Patron giving medium armor + shield proficiency. Mage Armor (Armor of Shadows invocation) ignored, since it requires no armor.
* Spell slots: 2 x 3rd lvl, restore on short rest.
* Saves: WIS + CHA proficient (warlock baseline).
* Cantrips: Eldritch Blast (mandatory for Agonizing Blast) + 2 RAW defaults (Mage Hand, Prestidigitation).
* Spells known: 6 at lvl 5. Listed: Hex, Hellish Rebuke, Misty Step, Suggestion, Fly + Exploding Skulls (homebrew). Replace any with actual choices.
* Patron: Hexblade guess. Justifies AC 16 + the metal-head vibe. Swap to Fiend/Archfey/Great Old One/Celestial/etc. if wrong.
* Pact Boon: Pact of the Blade (per uploader notes).

HOMEBREW RULES:
* Magic Wand: +5 damage on hit, -3 to attack rolls.
* Exploding Skulls: 8d6 fire, 20 ft sphere, DEX save DC 10 for half. Slow flight gives targets advantage on the save (DM ruling).
* HP rolled hit dice taken as flat averages, not rolled.

STILL TO FILL IN:
* Race (drives Speed, languages, racial traits)
* Background (proficiencies, languages, feature)
* Confirm spell list vs RAW defaults marked above
